hints.notifications: Array of { "event", "url" } objects, edited as JSON.
hints.webhookUrl: Where T-Kassa POSTs payment notifications. Must start with https://.

webhookTester.title: Webhook tester
webhookTester.description: Example custom section from the T-Kassa plugin — injected into the integration page through a widget zone. It reads this integration's options and calls a provider endpoint.
webhookTester.needsConfig: Finish configuring the integration to enable this.

webhookUrlEditor.title: Webhook URL
webhookUrlEditor.description: Example widget-owned option: this field is declared in the descriptor catalog but placed in no section, so the plugin's widget renders and saves it (POST without a section_id).
